id.footer.desc: Mobile Legends Corporate Championship — turnamen bergengsi antar tim korporat di Indonesia.
id.footer.copyright: 2025 Mobile Legends Corporate Championship. Hak cipta dilindungi.
id.index.hero.tagline:
Turnamen Mobile Legends antar perusahaan & korporat.
Buktikan dominasi tim Anda di arena tertinggi.
id.index.about.title: Tentang MCC
id.index.about.subtitle: Mobile Legends Corporate Championship (MCC) adalah turnamen Mobile Legends: Bang Bang yang diperuntukkan bagi tim-tim dari lingkungan perusahaan dan korporat. Kompetisi ini hadir untuk mempertemukan para profesional yang ingin bersaing di luar jam kerja.
id.index.about.item1.title: Kompetisi Resmi
id.index.about.item1.desc: Format turnamen terstruktur dengan regulasi jelas dan wasit resmi setiap pertandingan.
id.index.about.item2.title: Khusus Korporat
id.index.about.item2.desc: Hanya tim dari perusahaan/korporat yang dapat mendaftar. Satu perusahaan dapat menurunkan maksimal 2 tim.
id.index.about.item3.title: Format Kompetitif
id.index.about.item3.desc: Fase grup (round-robin) dilanjutkan dengan eliminasi single bracket hingga Grand Final.
id.index.timeline.title: Jadwal Turnamen
id.index.timeline.subtitle: Timeline penting yang perlu Anda catat.
id.index.timeline.e1.title: Pendaftaran Dibuka
id.index.timeline.e1.desc: Form registrasi tim resmi dibuka. Slot terbatas 32 tim.
id.index.timeline.e2.title: Pendaftaran Ditutup
id.index.timeline.e2.desc: Batas akhir pengisian form dan pembayaran biaya registrasi.
id.index.timeline.e3.title: Technical Meeting
id.index.timeline.e3.desc: Pertemuan teknis wajib dihadiri oleh kapten atau manajer tim.
id.index.timeline.e4.title: Fase Grup Dimulai
id.index.timeline.e4.desc: Pertandingan fase grup (round-robin) mulai digelar setiap akhir pekan.
id.index.timeline.e5.title: Grand Final
id.index.timeline.e5.desc: Puncak kompetisi — final offline dengan penonton dan live streaming.
id.index.cta.title: Siap Bertanding?
id.index.cta.desc: Daftarkan tim korporat Anda sekarang sebelum slot penuh. Hanya tersedia 32 slot untuk Season 1.
id.teams.hero.title: Tim Terdaftar
id.teams.hero.subtitle: Daftar tim yang telah resmi terdaftar di MCC Season 1.
id.teams.slot.label: Slot Terisi
id.teams.filter.placeholder: Cari nama tim, tag, atau perusahaan...
id.teams.no_result: Tidak ada tim yang sesuai filter.
id.members.hero.title: Member Turnamen
id.members.hero.subtitle: Perusahaan-perusahaan yang telah bergabung menjadi member MCC Season 1.
id.members.list.title: Daftar Member
id.members.list.subtitle: Perusahaan yang telah resmi tergabung dalam MCC Season 1.
id.members.join.label: Bergabung Sekarang
id.members.join.title: Daftarkan Perusahaan Anda
id.members.join.desc: Ingin perusahaan Anda menjadi member MCC Season 1? Hubungi panitia kami melalui WhatsApp untuk informasi pendaftaran membership, kuota tim, dan detail teknis lainnya.
id.register.hero.title: Daftar Tim
id.register.hero.subtitle: Isi form berikut dengan data yang valid. Pastikan seluruh data anggota tim sudah benar sebelum submit.
id.register.ph.notes: Informasi tambahan, permintaan khusus, atau pertanyaan (opsional)
id.register.payment.title: ℹ️ Informasi Pembayaran
id.register.payment.desc: Setelah submit, panitia akan menghubungi melalui WhatsApp dengan instruksi pembayaran biaya registrasi. Biaya registrasi: Rp 250.000 / tim.
id.register.agree1: Saya menyatakan bahwa seluruh data yang diisi adalah benar dan valid. Pemalsuan data dapat mengakibatkan diskualifikasi.
id.register.agree2: Saya telah membaca dan menyetujui Peraturan Turnamen MCC Season 1.
id.register.helper.players: Minimal 5 pemain wajib diisi, maksimal 7 pemain
id.register.confirm.agree1: Saya menyatakan bahwa data yang diisi adalah benar dan sesuai dengan identitas resmi perusahaan.
id.register.confirm.agree2: Saya setuju dengan syarat dan ketentuan pendaftaran MCC Season 1.
id.register.success.title: Pendaftaran Berhasil!
id.register.success.desc: Terima kasih telah mendaftarkan tim Anda. Panitia MCC Season 1 akan segera menghubungi Anda untuk verifikasi data.
id.faq.hero.title: Pertanyaan yang Sering Ditanyakan
id.faq.hero.subtitle: Temukan jawaban atas pertanyaan umum seputar MCC Season 1.
id.faq.contact.title: Masih ada pertanyaan?
id.faq.contact.desc: Hubungi tim panitia kami melalui WhatsApp atau email. Kami siap membantu.

en.footer.desc: Mobile Legends Corporate Championship — prestigious tournament for corporate teams in Indonesia.
en.footer.copyright: 2025 Mobile Legends Corporate Championship. All rights reserved.
en.index.hero.tagline:
Mobile Legends tournament for corporate & company teams.
Prove your team's dominance in the ultimate arena.
en.index.about.title: About MCC
en.index.about.subtitle: Mobile Legends Corporate Championship (MCC) is a Mobile Legends: Bang Bang tournament for company and corporate teams. The competition brings professionals together to compete outside working hours.
en.index.about.item1.title: Official Competition
en.index.about.item1.desc: Structured tournament format with clear regulations and official referees for every match.
en.index.about.item2.title: Corporate Only
en.index.about.item2.desc: Only teams from companies/corporations may register. One company may field a maximum of 2 teams.
en.index.about.item3.title: Competitive Format
en.index.about.item3.desc: Group stage (round-robin) followed by single elimination bracket through to the Grand Final.
en.index.timeline.title: Tournament Schedule
en.index.timeline.subtitle: Key dates you need to mark.
en.index.timeline.e1.title: Registration Opens
en.index.timeline.e1.desc: Official team registration form opens. Limited to 32 team slots.
en.index.timeline.e2.title: Registration Closes
en.index.timeline.e2.desc: Deadline for form submission and registration fee payment.
en.index.timeline.e3.title: Technical Meeting
en.index.timeline.e3.desc: Mandatory meeting — team captain or manager must attend.
en.index.timeline.e4.title: Group Stage Begins
en.index.timeline.e4.desc: Group stage matches (round-robin) kick off every weekend.
en.index.timeline.e5.title: Grand Final
en.index.timeline.e5.desc: The pinnacle of competition — offline final with audience and live streaming.
en.index.cta.title: Ready to Compete?
en.index.cta.desc: Register your corporate team now before slots fill up. Only 32 slots available for Season 1.
en.teams.hero.title: Registered Teams
en.teams.hero.subtitle: Teams officially registered for MCC Season 1.
en.teams.slot.label: Slots Filled
en.teams.filter.placeholder: Search team name, tag, or company...
en.members.hero.title: Tournament Members
en.members.hero.subtitle: Companies that have officially joined MCC Season 1.
en.members.list.title: Registered Members
en.members.list.subtitle: Companies officially joined MCC Season 1.
en.members.join.label: Join Now
en.members.join.title: Register Your Company
en.members.join.desc: Want your company to join MCC Season 1? Contact our committee via WhatsApp for membership registration, team quota, and technical details.
en.register.hero.title: Register Team
en.register.hero.subtitle: Fill out the form with valid data. Ensure all team member data is correct before submitting.
en.register.ph.notes: Additional info, special requests, or questions (optional)
en.register.payment.title: ℹ️ Payment Information
en.register.payment.desc: After submitting, the committee will contact you via WhatsApp with payment instructions. Registration fee: Rp 250,000 / team.
en.register.agree1: I declare that all data entered is true and valid. Falsifying data may result in disqualification.
en.register.agree2: I have read and agree to the MCC Season 1 Tournament Rules.
en.register.confirm.agree1: I declare that the data entered is correct and matches the official company identity.
en.register.confirm.agree2: I agree to the MCC Season 1 registration terms and conditions.
en.register.success.title: Registration Successful!
en.register.success.desc: Thank you for registering your team. The MCC Season 1 committee will soon contact you for data verification.
en.faq.hero.title: Frequently Asked Questions
en.faq.hero.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about MCC Season 1.
en.faq.contact.title: Still have questions?
en.faq.contact.desc: Contact our committee via WhatsApp or email. We're here to help.
